data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic commission calculation per booking. However, the evidence does not explicitly demonstrate that the system performs this calculation automatically for each booking. While the linked use case describes a scenario where commissions are tracked, it does not provide concrete evidence of the automatic calculation process, leading to a gap in fulfilling the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of automatic commission calculation per booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the automatic commission calculation.
